---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**Command run**
```
supplychain-kit <command> <flags>
```

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened. Include full error output.

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- Architecture: [e.g. amd64, arm64]
- supplychain-kit version: (`supplychain-kit --version`)
- Go version (if building from source):

**Scanner tools installed** (output of `which syft grype semgrep gitleaks joern-parse`)
```

```

**Additional context**
Add any other context, logs, or screenshots.
